semantic.role: Unit test suite for the fix-prompt engine module.
responsibilities: Verify that generateFixPrompt produces correct LLM prompts given a FixViolationContext.
Ensure the generated prompt includes expected contextual information (file path, content, structural skeleton, violation details).
Exercise edge cases in the fix prompt generation logic.
outOfScope: Integration or end-to-end testing of the fix engine.
Testing LLM provider behavior or prompt execution.
invariants: Test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule: test-file-suffix).
Test suite imports only vitest and the module under test.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Isolate fix-prompt generation logic behind a testable unit boundary.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactoring to remove legacy CLI aliases, rebuild documentation, fix schema and tests. This test suite aligns with the updated module structure.
